headline: VeriSign (VRSN) Valuation Check After Recent Share Price Strength And Governance Concerns
summary: VeriSign (VRSN) has drawn investor attention after its recent share price move, with the stock closing at $259.85 and posting positive returns over the past month and past 3 months. See our latest analysis for VeriSign. The recent 10.38% 30 day share price return adds to an 8.03% year to date share price gain, while the 3 year total shareholder return of 23.48% points to steadier long run compounding.
